failedAssertions.reason: Automation Tier dropdown IS VISIBLE and interactable (3 tiers shown after enabling autopilot). Round 2 blocker resolved. However, approval enforcement behavior cannot be validated without creating actual delivery runs — which requires VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 (idea->swipe->planning) to work first.

DeliveryRunSection IS VISIBLE with 'No delivery runs yet.' empty state. Round 2 blocker resolved. Cannot verify workspace/port metadata without creating actual delivery runs — which requires VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 to work first.

Budget tab shows project-level USD budget (0.00) and Autopilot Settings shows budget minutes (60). No 'paused' state indicator visible when autopilot is running normally. Backend enforces pause but UI never shows the paused condition. UNCHANGED from round 2.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: recordSwipe action handler now exists in root worker.ts (line 3511), round 2 'not registered' issue resolved in code. Full end-to-end flow (create idea -> swipe Yes/Now -> planning artifact) was not exercised because ideas must be created first through the Ideas section.

'Pause Autopilot' button IS VISIBLE. Round 2 blocker resolved. However: (1) pause->resume end-to-end flow not exercised, (2) run-level pause/resume blocked by VAL-AUTOPILOT-032 (no delivery runs exist)

improvementsFromRound2.improvement: recordSwipe action handler IS registered at worker.ts:3511 (was missing in round 2)
Automation Tier dropdown IS VISIBLE and interactable after enabling autopilot (3 tiers)
DeliveryRunSection IS VISIBLE in the Autopilot tab (was entirely missing in round 2)
'Pause Autopilot' button IS VISIBLE in Autopilot Settings (was missing in round 2)

unchangedFromRound2.reason: Budget pause state still not visible in UI

systemicBlockers.description: VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 (idea->swipe->planning flow) is the critical path blocker. All other delivery-control assertions (approval enforcement, workspace metadata, run-level pause/resume) are blocked by it. The recordSwipe handler is now registered in code, but the UI requires ideas to be created first before the swipe review section becomes active.
systemicBlockers.rootCause: The idea creation and swipe review UI flow (Ideas section -> Swipe Review section) must produce an approved idea that can trigger planning artifact creation. This chain must work before delivery runs can be created.

systemicBlockers.description: VAL-AUTOPILOT-033: Budget pause state display completely missing. The backend sets autopilot.paused=true when budget is exceeded, but no UI element shows this state.
systemicBlockers.rootCause: No UI component renders the paused state or pauseReason from autopilot or companyBudget entities.

appliedUpdates.description: Added note: plugin must be installed via POST /api/plugins/install with {packageName: localPath, isLocalPath: true}. Not available through npm registry.

frictions.description: Plugin required manual API installation — not available in Plugin Manager UI npm install flow

progressFromRound1And2: Significant improvement from round 2: (1) recordSwipe handler now registered in root worker.ts, (2) Automation Tier dropdown interactable, (3) DeliveryRunSection visible, (4) Pause button visible. Remaining: (1) Full idea->swipe->planning flow not exercised, (2) Budget pause state still missing from UI.
